lectionary.gospelTitle: Jesus Is Tempted in the Desert

readings.summary: God establishes a covenant with Noah and his descendants.

readings.citation:
Ps 25:4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. see v.10
Your ways, O Lord, are love and truth
to those who keep your covenant
readings.antiphon:
Ps 25:4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. see v.10
Your ways, O Lord, are love and truth
to those who keep your covenant

readings.summary:
As life was saved by the ark,
so are our lives saved in Baptism.

One does not live on bread alone, but on every word
that comes forth from the mouth of God.
After forty days in the desert, Jesus proclaims the reign of God.

antiphons.text:
One does not live by bread alone, but by every word
that comes forth from the mouth of God.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Ps 91 (90):4
antiphons.text:
The Lord will conceal you with his pinions,
and under his wings you will trust.
